PostToolUse.name: controller-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about route auth, CSRF, and HTTP testing when a controller is modified

hooks.prompt: Controller file changed. Verify: @http.route() has explicit auth= and csrf protection. Consider HttpCase test for route verification. Suggest /odoo-security --layer=routes.

PostToolUse.name: access-csv-changed
PostToolUse.description: Validate access CSV format and suggest security tests

hooks.prompt: Access CSV modified. Verify: model_id:id format (model_ prefix, dots to underscores) and group references. Test with AccessError: user WITH and WITHOUT permission. Suggest /odoo-security --layer=access.

PostToolUse.name: wizard-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about TransientModel access rules when a wizard file is modified

hooks.prompt: Wizard file changed. TransientModel requires ir.model.access.csv entry with perm_create=1, perm_unlink=1. Suggest /odoo-security --layer=access.
